topics.label: ndarray Creation
topics.description: np.array, np.zeros, np.ones, np.arange, np.linspace, np.random. The ndarray is NumPy's core.

topics.label: Indexing & Slicing
topics.description: Integer, slice, boolean, and fancy indexing. Multi-dimensional array access.

topics.label: Shape & Reshape
topics.description: ndim, shape, size, reshape, ravel, flatten, transpose. Understand array dimensions.

topics.label: Data Types (dtypes)
topics.description: int32, float64, bool, complex128. dtype controls memory layout and precision.

topics.label: Element-wise Operations
topics.description: Vectorized arithmetic, comparison, and universal functions (ufuncs). No loops needed.

topics.label: Broadcasting
topics.description: Rules for combining arrays of different shapes. Broadcasting avoids explicit loops.

topics.label: Aggregation
topics.description: sum, mean, std, min, max, argmin, argmax along axes.

topics.label: Linear Algebra
topics.description: np.dot, np.linalg.inv, eig, svd, solve. Core linear algebra operations.

topics.label: Random
topics.description: np.random.Generator for reproducible random numbers. Distributions and sampling.

topics.label: Stacking & Splitting
topics.description: np.concatenate, vstack, hstack, split. Combine and divide arrays.

topics.label: Performance
topics.description: Vectorization, views vs copies, memory layout (C vs Fortran order).
